acquisition_recommendation: Tier-1 OA via arXiv. Acquisition cost = zero (one curl/wget call). Ekvac. 30:305 (P_III paper in 069r1 substrate) for synthesizer Path γ analytic-guidance attempt at chart-map closure.

substrate_gap_chapter_section_mapping.069r1_substrate_gap_description: explicit (a_0, a_1, a_2) -> (alpha_inf, alpha_0, beta_inf, beta_0) chart-map for CT v1.3 sec 3.5 4-tuple = (1/6, 0, 0, -1/2)
substrate_gap_chapter_section_mapping.expected_fw_filler_section: CPA paper §2-§3 (Hamiltonian / tau-function development for PV + PIII; the PIII section is most directly relevant)
substrate_gap_chapter_section_mapping.prior_finding_substance_pro: CPA 2002 paper §3 develops PIII via Okamoto's Hamiltonian + tau-function theory; cross-references Okamoto 1987 P_III paper (CPA reference [32] = Okamoto Funkcial. Ekvac. 30:305 1987). The PIII parameter setup IS within scope of this paper.
substrate_gap_chapter_section_mapping.prior_finding_substance_con: WITTE-FORRESTER-2010-ACQUISITION (4338cee) absence_audit.md established that the FW oeuvre uniformly does NOT invoke W(B_2) <-> W((2A_1)^(1)) cross-walk. The 4-tuple chart-map for CT v1.3 sec 3.5 may be in surface-type / Sakai D_6 territory rather than CPA-paper-style sigma-form territory.
substrate_gap_chapter_section_mapping.implication_for_069r2: Probability that FW2002 + Okamoto 1987 jointly furnish substrate for the chart-map = MODERATE-TO-HIGH if the chart-map can be derived from sigma-form / Hamiltonian PIII; LOW if the chart-map intrinsically requires surface-type / Sakai D_6 machinery. Path γ (FW2002 arXiv + Okamoto 1987) is a low-cost / moderate-yield attempt that synth at LANE-1 should pursue first before acquisition envelopes.
